prompt_INIT_CONFIG_HERE_ANYWAY.message: Startalize config file halkan si kastaba ha ahaatee

log_OVERWRITING_CONFIG_AT.message: Previous articleXildhibaano ka tirsan Baarlamaanka oo maanta kulan ku yeeshay Muqdisho

log_TO_CREATE_DEFAULT_CONFIG.message: si aad u abuurto faylka qaabeynta default

tip_FOR_MORE_HELP_VISIT.message: Si aad u hesho caawimaad dheeraad ah, booqo

tip_MOVE_CONFIG_TO_ROOT.message: U guur faylka si aad xidid uga dhigto mashruuca aad rabto inaad ku isticmaasho

warn_NO_PROJECT_ROOT_FOUND.message: Ma jiro xidid mashruuc la ogaaday

warn_NO_LONGER_HAS_ANY_EFFECT.message: mar dambe ma laha wax saameyn ah.

help_PATH.message: Bilaabida dir si aad u raadiso xididka mashruuca (default: CWD)

help_MAX_DEPTH.message: Heerarka Max si ay u gudbiyaan (default: 9)

help_MARKERS.message: Faylasha Calaamadaha Macaamiisha si aad u raadiso

help_INIT.message: Abuur .project-root.config.json5 file si loo keydiyo fursadaha default

help_FORCE.message: Xoog overwrite file config jira marka la isticmaalayo init
